headlines.title: Hungry children, canceled benefits: Arizona’s food stamp cuts are a warning for America
headlines.description: Under President Donald Trump’s “big, beautiful bill,” food stamp applicants are fighting to prove eligibility. A crisis in Arizona offers a warning for America.

headlines.title: The cage match is on for tickets to Trump’s UFC fight at the White House
headlines.description: Some 4,000-plus spectators who are lucky enough, cunning enough or rich enough will score a seat to the UFC fight on the South Lawn next month.

headlines.title: White House Correspondents’ Dinner shooting suspect pleads not guilty in federal court
headlines.description: The man charged with attempting to assassinate President Donald Trump at the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner last month pleaded not guilty at a Monday arraignment in federal court

headlines.title: U.S. and China arrest 5 in joint drug smuggling investigation ahead of Trump trip
headlines.description: U.S. and Chinese authorities jointly arrested five suspects in a cross-border smuggling and trafficking operation, Beijing said Monday, touting the cooperation ahead of President Donald Trump’s state visit this week.

headlines.title: Trump Heads to China; Sean Duffy Under Fire for Reality Show
headlines.description: President Donald Trump is headed to China for a high-stakes summit with President Xi Jinping where Iran and its impact on the global economy is expected to take center stage. Meanwhile, Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy is facing backlash for his latest project, a family road trip reality show that he says was paid for by a nonprofit group instead of taxpayers. NBC’s Ryan Nobles reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Trump Calls Iran’s Response to US Peace Proposal ‘Unacceptable’
headlines.description: President Donald Trump has announced that the United States is rejecting Iran’s latest counter proposal passed on by Pakistan, writing, “I don’t like it– totally unacceptable.” Iran says its demands include the United States lifting its blockade and releasing Iranian frozen assets. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: ‘It has to be bipartisan’: Governors find solutions on maternal health
headlines.description: Gov. Wes Moore (D-Md.), Gov. Sarah Huckabee Sanders (R-Ark.) and philanthropist Olivia Walton join Meet the Press for a Common Ground conversation around maternal health.

headlines.title: 'Ohio is back': Both parties navigate competitive midterm races in a forgotten battleground
headlines.description: Two hard facts hover over this year’s midterm races in Ohio.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy defends new reality show amid backlash
headlines.description: Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy is making a controversial road trip back to reality TV.“The Great American Road Trip,” a five-part reality series set to air on YouTube in celebration of the United States’ 250th anniversary, follows Duffy as he travels across the country with his wife, Fox News host Rachel Campos-Duffy, and their nine children.“The motto is: To love America is to see America,” Duffy says in the show’s trailer.

headlines.title: Energy secretary says White House is open to suspending gas tax amid soaring prices
headlines.description: Energy Secretary Chris Wright told NBC News’ “Meet the Press” on Sunday that the Trump administration is “open to all ideas” to lower the cost of gas, including suspending the federal gas tax

headlines.title: Govs. Wes Moore and Sarah Huckabee Sanders on maternal health investments
headlines.description: Sanders said she raised alarms about maternal health in Arkansas after she noticed the state had one of the highest maternal mortality rates.
